name: LinkVault
tagline: Shorten, track, and optimize every link your business shares
metaDescription: LinkVault replaces Bitly with branded short links, click analytics, QR codes, and UTM builders — all included in your AppBuster subscription.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🔗</text></svg>

features.title: Branded Short Links
features.desc: Create short links using your own custom domain. Branded links build trust and increase click-through rates by up to 34% compared to generic shorteners.

features.title: Click Analytics
features.desc: Track clicks, geographic locations, referrers, and device types for every link in real time. Understand exactly how your audience engages with shared content.

features.title: QR Code Generator
features.desc: Generate dynamic QR codes that link to any URL. Update the destination after printing without reprinting the code — perfect for menus, packaging, and events.

features.title: UTM Builder
features.desc: Attach UTM parameters to links with a visual form instead of editing URLs manually. Consistent campaign tagging means cleaner data in Google Analytics.

features.title: Link Expiration and Passwords
features.desc: Set expiration dates or password-protect links for time-sensitive campaigns and confidential content. Expired links redirect to a page of your choice.

features.title: Bulk Link Creation
features.desc: Upload a CSV of URLs and generate hundreds of short links in seconds. Each link inherits your default domain and tagging rules automatically.
